reasoning: The time series tool indicates a combined estimated probability of 0.56 for Nov 30, based on seasonal strength and returning near a post-earnings high. Since weekly stock movements are noisy, we temper this slightly towards 0.5, using 0.54. As the horizon extends to Dec 23, uncertainty increases, pulling the estimate closer to 0.50 (0.52). By Feb 21, the stock will likely have gone ex-dividend for Q4 (historically late December with regular and sometimes special dividends totaling ~$0.20-$0.30 per share). This dividend price drop counteracts normal upward drift, leading to a balanced 0.50 probability for the furthest horizon.
